'''Lar Maendin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] Maendin sold the locations of Rebel bases to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], necessitating the evacuation of the bases before Imperial forces destroyed them. After the rise of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Maendin branched out on his own and worked as an independent [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]].
